name: Lentil & Macaroni Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Macaroni or other pasta broken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lentils in cold water until tender (about 1-1/2 hours).
2. In a separate saucepan, heat olive oil.
3. Add celery and onions to the oil; sauté until golden brown.
4. Add tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Drain cooked macaroni.
6. Bring salted water to a boil in a kettle; add macaroni and cook for 10 minutes.
7. Combine lentils, boiled macaroni, salt, and pepper.
8. Simmer until the pasta is tender.
9. Serve with a tossed green salad and favorite cheese.
Fat grams per serving: Approximately
Cook Time: About 1-1/2 hours
